message:
feat(conformance): add link prediction algorithm conformance testing

Add conformance tests for link prediction algorithms comparing Rust
implementation against Python NetworkX:
- Jaccard coefficient
- Adamic-Adar index
- Preferential attachment
- Resource allocation index

Includes fixtures with NetworkX-generated reference values, operation
handlers in conformance harness, and comparison logic with float tolerance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
